description.text: It’s open season and you’re the prey. Controlling the battlefield will need true blockhead teamwork. One Base.

ru.original: It’s open season and you’re the prey. Controlling the battlefield will need true blockhead teamwork. One Base.
ru.translation: Сезон охоты открыт, и в этот раз жертва — ты. Если хочешь доминировать на поле боя, придется думать своей дубовой башкой. Одна база.

es.original: It’s open season and you’re the prey. Controlling the battlefield will need true blockhead teamwork. One Base.
es.translation:
Es temporada de caza y tú eres la presa.
Un núcleo.

de.original: It’s open season and you’re the prey. Controlling the battlefield will need true blockhead teamwork. One Base.
de.translation: Die Jagd ist eröffnet und ihr seid die Beute! Um das Schlachtfeld zu kontrollieren, ist Teamwork angesagt. Eine Basis.

pt.original: It’s open season and you’re the prey. Controlling the battlefield will need true blockhead teamwork. One Base.
pt.translation: Chegou a temporada de caça, e você é a presa. Controlar o campo de batalha exigirá grande colaboração. Uma Base.

fr.original: It’s open season and you’re the prey. Controlling the battlefield will need true blockhead teamwork. One Base.
fr.translation: La chasse est ouverte, et vous en êtes la proie ! Contrôler le champ de bataille demandera un intense travail d'équipe. Une base.
